caption_text: Incredibly fun, insightful, and hilarious conversation with @theovon. Had a blast mate talking about life, Aussie stories and Crime 101

I’m launching a new series with my best mates! I’m sending @azzagrist and @zocobodypro around the world to unlock health and wellness secrets to live happier and healthier lives, all while risking their own for our entertainment 😂

Azza & Zoc Do Earth premieres tomorrow on our @wildstateprod YouTube channel. Link in bio to subscribe. You won’t want to miss this.

caption_text:
The Australian actor is about to break new ground with his role as an introverted jewel thief working jobs along LA’s 101 freeway – with Mark Ruffalo’s crumpled cop in pursuit. Greg Williams is on-set and Hemsworth tells Hollywood Authentic about re-teaming with The Hulk, what keeps him curious and which castmate intimidated him…

Photography by @gregwilliamsphotography
Words by @crowther_jane

caption_text:
Thank you, @time. Honored to be recognized for the work we did on longevity health and wellness with @natgeo 

Read the story at link in bio
High-stakes energy meant for the big screen. #Crime101 is Certified Fresh at 88% on Rotten Tomatoes, and in Theaters and IMAX everywhere tonight. Get tickets now
Amazing night at the LA premiere for Crime 101. Incredibly grateful for everyone coming along. Response to the film has been amazing, can’t wait for everyone to check it out 🙏 in cinemas Feb 13th

Getting to work with my brother @chrishemsworth is always a blast.

You can watch @crime101film exclusively in theaters starting tonight.
